series_metadata.series_title: Complaints to the Cemetery Dispute Commission - Public Records
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule pertains to records received by the Division regarding a complaint against a registered cemetery that is a matter of public record. This retention schedule includes, but is not limited to, the complaint, documents received with the complaint, any notice of hearing, any proof of service, exhibits submitted to the Commission for its review, any correspondence related to the complaint or any writing issued by the Commission.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records are retained on-site until the disciplinary file is closed at the administrative level - the date of the Division''s final notice or the date of the Commission Order, whichever is later. Then the paper records may be maintained off-site for five years after the disciplinary file is closed at the administrative level - the date of the Division''s final notice or the date of the Commission Order, whichever is later. Then paper records may be recycled. ; Microform: Any images on microform are to be maintained for five years after the disciplinary file is closed at the administrative level - the date of the Division''s final notice or the date of the Commission Order, whichever is later. Then, the microform is destroyed. ; Electronic: Any images in machine readable format are to be maintained for five years after the disciplinary file is closed at the administrative level - the date of the Division''s final notice or the date of the Commission Order, whichever is later. Then, the machine readable format is destroyed., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
